1: His praise shall shall continually be be in my mouth.
2: The humble shall hear thereof thereof , and be glad.
3: And let us exalt his name together.
4: And delivered me from all my fears.
5: And their faces were not ashamed.
6: And saved him out of all his troubles.
8: Blessed is is the man that that trusteth in him.
9: For there is there is no want to them that fear him.
10: But they that seek the LORD LORD shall not want any good thing thing .
11: I will teach you the fear of the LORD LORD .
12: And And loveth many many days, that he may see good?
13: And thy lips from speaking guile.
15: And his ears are open are open unto their cry.
16: To cut off the remembrance of them from the earth.
17: And delivereth them out of all their troubles.
18: And saveth such as be of a contrite spirit.
19: But the LORD LORD delivereth him out of them all.
20: Not one of them is broken.
21: And they that hate the righteous shall be desolate.
22: And none of them that trust in him shall be desolate.
